Auth.login_subtitle: Please enter your details to continue
Auth.login_error: An error occurred, please try again later.

Header.login_required_to_create_event: Please login to create an event

Homepage.Own_a_transparent_ticket_to_worthwhile_e: Own transparent tickets for worthwhile experiences
Homepage.EvoTicket_combines_modern_authentication: EvoTicket combines modern authentication technology and intuitive digital experience to help users buy tickets with peace of mind, manage ownership clearly, and discover more suitable events.

Footer.slogan: Easy Buy - Absolute Security - NFT Souvenir Experience

UserTickets.title: My Tickets
UserTickets.no_tickets: You don't have any tickets yet.

Resale.marketplace_subtitle: Buy and sell tickets securely and transparently with Blockchain technology

ResellTicket.title: List Ticket for Resale
ResellTicket.subtitle: Set your price and publish ticket to marketplace
ResellTicket.price_setting_subtitle: Enter your desired listing price. Selling price must comply with system-defined caps.
ResellTicket.revenue_note: The received amount will be transferred after the resale transaction is successfully completed. Platform fees are applied to operate a transparent and secure resale marketplace.
ResellTicket.note_1: Tickets can only be resold when valid, unused, and event hasn't ended
ResellTicket.note_2: After listing, the QR code will be locked
ResellTicket.note_3: You can delist if no buyer has purchased yet
ResellTicket.note_4: Resale tickets will be verified and ownership transferred transparently in-system
ResellTicket.resell_failed: Ticket listing failed. Please try again.
ResellTicket.submit_error: An error occurred while submitting listing request
ResellTicket.not_allowed: This ticket currently does not support resale

ResaleDetail.page_subtitle: View official resale ticket details before proceeding to buy.
ResaleDetail.official_verified_note: Tickets are verified and traded through EvoTicket's official resale marketplace.
ResaleDetail.unavailable_subtitle: This listing has just been sold or removed. Please go back to view other resale tickets.
ResaleDetail.verified_marketplace_note: You are viewing a verified resale ticket listing in EvoTicket's official marketplace.
ResaleDetail.ticket_source_value: Ticket minted and recorded in the system
ResaleDetail.ownership_status_value: Will be transferred to you after transaction completes
ResaleDetail.verification_desc: EvoTicket verifies resale ticket origins and ensures transparent ownership updates after successful payment.
ResaleDetail.valid_price_note: Valid price according to resale regulations
ResaleDetail.anti_speculation_note: This listing price has been checked against the system's anti-speculation rules.
ResaleDetail.final_price_note: Final price may include additional fees at the payment step.
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_1: Payment will be made through a secure payment gateway
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_2: Ticket ownership will be transferred to your account immediately after transaction completes
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_3: Seller's old QR code will no longer be valid
ResaleDetail.after_purchase_4: Ticket will appear in your Ticket Wallet for tracking and use
ResaleDetail.resale_note_1: This is an official resale transaction within the EvoTicket system
ResaleDetail.resale_note_2: Resale tickets are verified before being displayed on the marketplace
ResaleDetail.resale_note_3: After payment, ownership is updated immediately in the system
ResaleDetail.resale_note_4: If you need support, please contact the Help Center

EventCreate.step1_subtitle: Start with the most basic information to identify your event
EventCreate.images_desc: Poster and cover photos are the first things fans see
EventCreate.image_warning_desc: Images must follow display standards for approval. Avoid placing critical text outside the safe zone.
EventCreate.basic_info_desc: Name, category, and detailed event description
EventCreate.event_name_placeholder: e.g. Anh Trai Say Hi Concert 2024
EventCreate.event_description_placeholder: Enter detailed description so fans understand your event clearly...
EventCreate.location_desc: Where the event takes place and map position
EventCreate.specific_address_placeholder: Building number, street name, building name...
EventCreate.submission_warning_desc: Do not include prohibited contact info (phone, email, external links) in public content.
EventCreate.step2_subtitle: Configure schedule and ticket classes for sale
EventCreate.showtime_desc: Set performance windows for the event
EventCreate.ticket_desc: Manage ticket types and pricing for each showtime
EventCreate.seat_map_desc: Select how the venue will be arranged for fans
EventCreate.step3_subtitle: Configure how the event is published, sold, and operated
EventCreate.publicity_desc: Control when and how your event appears on the platform
EventCreate.sales_desc: Set the start and end times for receiving ticket orders
EventCreate.sales_end_desc: Automatically closes when sold out or event starts
EventCreate.resale_desc: Strictly control resale activity to protect organizers and fans
EventCreate.ops_desc: Number of gates and check-in personnel at the event
EventCreate.instructions_desc: Messages displayed after purchase and check-in guide
EventCreate.step4_subtitle: Set up payout profiles and revenue reconciliation methods
EventCreate.org_profile_desc: Legal entity and bank account for receiving revenue
EventCreate.apply_to_event_desc: Confirm payment information to be applied for this event
EventCreate.payout_notice: Revenue will be transferred to your account 3-5 business days after the event ends.
EventCreate.incomplete_payout_warning: Incomplete payout profile may affect reconciliation progress.
EventCreate.manage_profile_desc: Change profile information in account settings
EventCreate.edit_in_org_account_desc: Access Organization Settings to change important legal information.
EventCreate.step_note_desc: Payment information cannot be changed after the event starts selling tickets.
EventCreate.step5_subtitle: Review all information before submitting for approval
EventCreate.event_identity_desc: Visuals and basic information displayed on the home page
EventCreate.ticketing_schedule_desc: Statistics on showtimes and ticket structure
EventCreate.payout_identity_desc: Reconciliation info and legal entity status
EventCreate.pre_submission_check_desc: Ensure critical items are correctly configured
EventCreate.submission_warning: Please check carefully. After submission, information will be locked to ensure transparency.
EventCreate.ready_to_submit_desc: Your event will be reviewed by the EvoTicket team within 24 business hours.
EventCreate.review_info_1: The event will be visible immediately after approval.
EventCreate.review_info_2: Notification will be sent to the finance email.
